jpansim2analysis 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Find a file in a data directory.

Source: R/import-standalone-directory-utils.R
dot-inputter.Rd

This function generates a function that resolves a file path fragment to a specific file location in an input directory.

Usage

.inputter(directory = .here("input"))

Arguments

directory

the root of the input

Value

a function that takes a relative path and returns the absolute path of the input file. The function can take the same arguments as fs::dir_ls, and particularly useful is glob and type. The function

Unit tests



inp = .inputter(tempdir())
for (i in 1:10) {
  fs::file_touch(fs::path(tempdir(), sprintf("test_
}

testthat::expect_true(fs::file_exists(inp("test_2.txt")))
testthat::expect_error(inp("test_0.txt"))

testthat::expect_equal(length(inp(glob="*.txt")),10)
